title: A Decisive Matchup in the Onigashima Raid
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Black Maria, Robin as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It was a mistake to let a wannabe oden like you eat it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The makami is Wano's Guardian Deity!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Now it's your job to protect wano...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Orochi may have been a tyrant,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But he transformed this country into a giant weapons factory!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just have to take your rightful place as ruler and claim the fruits of their labor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm going to help the Samuel and protect this country from you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: No more chains!! This country will open!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm not gonna let that happen!!

dialogue.speaker: Black Maria
dialogue.text: Robin-san!! Get a hold of yourself!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 33 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
